failures.error_message: iNova repository is not accessible in this cloud execution environment. git clone via HTTPS proxy returns 'Authentication failed for https://github.com/RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova.git' (repo not found / token lacks access). GitHub MCP tools restricted to rsa-data-solutions/always-on-engineering-fleet only — RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova returns 'Access denied: repository not configured for this session'. No tests could run.

notes: RECURRING (day 45): env_problem — iNova repo unreachable in cloud session for 45 consecutive days (2026-05-20 through 2026-07-03). Root cause: GITHUB_TOKEN lacks access to RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova; GitHub MCP session scope excludes that repo. Fix: add RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova as a session source repo in environment config, OR provide a GITHUB_PAT with Contents read permission for iNova.
